expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Enable admins to invite, manage, and audit workspace membership.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add membership invite and audit persistence models",
      "description": "As a system operator, I want membership and audit entities persisted so that admin actions have durable state and history.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Membership schema supports workspace user role and active membership status",
        "Invite schema stores pending invite email token and expiration",
        "Audit log schema stores actor action target and timestamp for membership events",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/20260618_workspace_membership.sql",
        "src/server/workspaces/workspace-membership.repository.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add admin invite member backend flow",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to invite a member by email so that new collaborators can join with appropriate access.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admin-only endpoint creates pending invite for email when not already active member",
        "Invite flow validates workspace scope and email format",
        "Invite creation records audit event for invite action",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/workspaces/members/invite-member.service.ts",
        "src/server/workspaces/members/members.routes.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add admin backend action to change member role",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to change member roles between viewer editor and admin so that permissions stay aligned with responsibilities.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admin-only endpoint updates target member role to viewer editor or admin",
        "Role change validates actor cannot remove final admin from workspace",
        "Role updates write membership-change audit event",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/workspaces/members/change-member-role.service.ts",
        "src/server/workspaces/members/members.routes.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add admin backend action to revoke workspace access",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to revoke member access so that former collaborators no longer retain workspace permissions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admin-only endpoint deactivates membership for selected member",
        "Revocation prevents removed member from loading protected workspace resources",
        "Revocation action writes audit event with actor and target member id",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/workspaces/members/revoke-member-access.service.ts",
        "src/server/workspaces/members/members.routes.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add backend query for recent membership audit entries",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to fetch recent membership changes so that I can review who changed access and when.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admin-only query returns recent membership audit entries ordered newest first",
        "Response includes actor email action target member and timestamp fields",
        "Query supports basic pagination for settings page list",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/workspaces/members/list-membership-audit.service.ts",
        "src/server/workspaces/members/members.routes.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Add workspace settings UI for inviting and managing member roles",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want invite and role-management controls in workspace settings so that I can manage access without direct database edits.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Settings page shows invite form accepting email input and submit action",
        "Members list shows role selector for each member with viewer editor and admin options",
        "Role changes and invite submissions show success or error feedback in page context",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/workspace-settings/member-management-panel.tsx",
        "src/ui/workspace-settings/invite-member-form.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-007",
      "title": "Add workspace settings UI for revoking access and reviewing audit log",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want revoke controls and recent membership audit log in settings so that I can safely remove access and verify change history.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Members list provides revoke action per member with confirmation step",
        "Recent membership changes section renders audit entries from backend query",
        "Audit rows show actor action target and timestamp in readable format",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/workspace-settings/member-row-actions.tsx",
        "src/ui/workspace-settings/membership-audit-log.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 7,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.
